hero.headline: Site, Tree & Fence Work in Central Florida

services.title: Site Services
services.description: Land clearing, grading, driveways and drainage

headings: Local, experienced land services in Central Florida.
Ready to walk through your property?
body: HLS officially came to life in 2019 by CEO Tyler Hoag however, the foundation was built many years before. With over a decade of experience in the utility forestry and construction sector our intention and direction for HLS became clear.

The business began as a single tractor service serving residential clients in the greater DeLand area. With time, opportunity, and education, HLS has grown into a certified arborist tree service and a full site service. HLS is supported by knowledgeable, driven and durable team members who surpass customer expectations.
about.footerTagline: Site work, tree services, and fencing for residential & commercial properties. Serving DeLand, DeLeon Springs, and surrounding Central Florida areas.

services.headline: Simple, straight-forward services for site work, tree work, and fencing.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.description: from an acre to hundreds of acres

services.name: Earth works and Excavation
services.description: soil removal/replacement, grading, building pads, roads, ponds, right of ways

services.name: Environmental Services
services.description: forestry mulching/mowing, invasive tree mitigation, herbicide treatments

services.name: Tree Removal
services.description: performed by certified arborist to ensure the safety of the jobsite

services.name: Tree Trimming
services.description: weak/dead/dying limb removal, branch lifting, reduction cuts

services.name: Palm Pruning
services.description: dead frond removal, fruit cluster removal, base spot removal

services.name: Wood
services.description: board, privacy, barbed wire, field fence, horse fence

contact.headline: Contact Us
contact.body: Tell us a little about your property and what you're hoping to accomplish. We will follow up to ask any additional questions and schedule a time to walk the property if needed.
contact.serviceAreaNote: We are based near DeLand and typically serve: DeLand & DeLeon Springs, Surrounding rural Central Florida areas, Residential neighborhoods and acreage properties
contact.afterHoursNote: If you reach us after hours, leave a brief message with your name, property location, and what you're looking to do.

join.headline: Join Our Team
join.description: We seek dependable people who take pride in their work and respect customers' properties, with backgrounds in equipment operation, tree work, fencing, or construction trades.
workCharacteristics: Outdoor work on a variety of properties
Opportunities to grow skills over time
join.applicationProcess: The organization reviews submissions based on project needs and contacts qualified candidates to discuss experience and subsequent steps.
